# Software bill of materials (SBOM)

In this folder (`third_party`) you can find different libraries.
Usually, those libraries are just copied into the project and used as is.
This file documents the commit hash of each library if it is not given in the filename of the directory of the third party dependency itself.

# 

# Okapi dependencies

Okapi has all dependencies of [Flatland](https://github.com/Vertexwahn/FlatlandRT) as well as the following:

```text
benchmark-4931aefb51d1e5872b096a97f43e13fa0fc33c8c
cpuinfo-5366f69c0f998e943a338f282b774c6a4386b005
depend_on_what_you_use-2926b0eef9ef2eb94f2925755e3ebc7ceed180c6
json-5d2754306d67d1e654a1a34e1d2e74439a9d53b3
oneTBB-88f73bbb48d5384ccba3e35b5c5a59451f718063
tinyobjloader-f5569db1ffb3b0222663ba38a7a9b3f6a461c469
yaml-cpp-b8882652fcbeba4c00dec019a39da91e702e474e
```
